{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230432463CD8773C64A9E6C7E51F"}"},"total":327},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7594722202225754905","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"又一本看完的，番茄上能看完对我来说都算佳作了，其实剧情确实还可以，虽然不是大长篇，但剧情还是比较饱满的，缺点是山寨了很多别的小说的人物名，有点出戏啊，还有就是最后种马了，见一个收一个，低分估计跟种马关系挺大，感觉要是只收赵飞燕，玉儿，小南就好了，其它一些完全没啥感情基础，纯就ooxx关系。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768289261,"group_id":"7359878481703881753","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/uQOdKSrBeNQEmQDl9ODMY=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790605&x-signature=YlzhmTSXCiJ8jjqgO%2BoHwuKOIgo%3D","user_id":"105135308297","user_name":"凛寒霜满天"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"105135308297","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1775479627,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7359878481703881753","book_info":{"abstract":"（江湖庙堂，爽文武侠，轻综武）周楚穿越大汉王朝，被人陷害入狱。
他发现，这里的大汉王朝，竟是刘备建立的蜀汉政权。
扶不起的阿斗刘禅，在这里竟然是大汉王朝的中兴君主，开国大帝。
牢狱中，周楚觉醒天命大虾系统，给首充礼包，直接获得全套降龙掌法，外加三十年内力。
天命大虾系统只需不断完成任务，就能获得源源不断的签到点，功法，内力，物品种类皆全。
降龙掌，铁布衫，雪饮狂刀，易筋经，金雁功，金刚不坏......
周楚武学样样满级，如天神下凡，连破大案。
之后拳打巫神教，脚踢天机府，狂虐敌国奸细，肃正朝廷歪风。
最后就连风华绝代的女帝陛下，都给他捶背捏腿，端茶倒水。
“陛下不可！周楚只是个粗鲁武夫啊！”
女帝眼光一凝：“竟敢离间朕与周爱卿，来人啦，拉出去砍了！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c7a8a6775fc7c1623324757e8afb289","author":"夜榔头","author_id":"","book_id":"7359878481703881753","book_name":"武侠：我三天百年内力很合理吧？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":16,"name":"武侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=16&name=武侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":378,"name":"女帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=378&name=女帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7359878824374321689","read_count":"10989","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"656562"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.1","serial_count":"304","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,武侠,系统,穿越,女帝,架空,开局,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/0e7e36179eb21035d4f1900da3b2c85f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779395566&x-signature=6UwpWqtI9r2Li0A12MyAYh07Xi4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_in
